name: Nexus-Point Xenas
tagline: Leyline hazards, Null Vanguard adds, and Lothraxion's Divine Guile shade game.

bosses.name: Chief Corewright Kasreth
bosses.summary: Never cross active Leyline Arrays; Reflux Charge breaks arrays; Corespark Detonation raid damage.

abilities.name: Corespark Detonation
abilities.note: Outrange blast; Sparkburn on raid after.

abilities.name: Reflux Charge
abilities.note: Charged player breaks arrays for team.

tips: Tank positions boss near arrays for melee charge uptime.

bosses.name: Corewarden Nysarra
bosses.summary: Kill Dreadflail + Grand Nullifier during Null Vanguard; burn boss in Lightscar Flare (+300% damage taken).

abilities.name: Null Vanguard
abilities.note: Adds must die before Lightscar Flare.

abilities.name: Lightscar Flare
abilities.note: Raid damage + boss massive vuln — pump CDs.

tips: Save offensive CDs for Flare windows.

bosses.name: Lothraxion
bosses.summary: Brilliant Dispersion DoT + Fractured Image knockback; Divine Guile — interrupt the real Lothraxion (has horns).

abilities.name: Divine Guile
abilities.note: Find horned copy; wrong kick = Core Exposure nuke.

abilities.name: Brilliant Dispersion
abilities.note: Defensive for DoT; dodge Fractured Image.

tips: Call 'horns up' for the true shade.
Holy Echo from Flarebat trash — outrange explosion.

dangerousPacks.name: Circuit Seer
dangerousPacks.why: Arcing Mana ramps group debuff; Erratic Surge shots.
handling: Focus Seer first; personal during Arcing Mana.

dangerousPacks.name: Flux Engineer + Mana Battery
dangerousPacks.why: Battery explodes if not killed after engineer dies.
